allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Initialize project with spec-kit and CLAUDE.md

Set up GitHub Spec Kit for spec-driven development workflow,
define project constitution with full tech stack \(Next.js, FastAPI,
pydantic-ai, Supabase\), and configure Claude Code settings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(gh repo create speckit-claude-boiler --private --description "Spec-kit + Claude Code boilerplate template" 2>&1)
Bash(git remote add boiler https://github.com/benlloydg/speckit-claude-boiler.git && git push boiler main 2>&1)
Bash(git remote remove boiler && git remote -v)

Bash(bash .specify/scripts/bash/create-new-feature.sh --json --number 1 --short-name "backend-foundation" "Backend foundation: models, config, Supabase state manager, Mistral and ElevenLabs API connectivity")

Bash(cat > /Users/benlloyd/Desktop/REPO/mistralhack26/apps/server/src/models/__init__.py << 'EOF'
from .incident import \(
    Severity,
    IncidentStatus,
    TimelineEvent,
    ActionItem,
    IncidentState,
\)
from .caller import \(
    TranscriptSegment,
    IntakeFacts,
    CallerRecord,
\)
from .vision import \(
    VisionDetection,
    FrameAnalysis,
    SceneDelta,
\)
from .triage import \(
    TriageResult,
    Corroboration,
    EvidenceFusionResult,
\)
from .dispatch import \(
    DispatchBrief,
\)
from .events import \(
    AgentLogEntry,
\)

__all__ = [
    "Severity",
    "IncidentStatus",
    "TimelineEvent",
    "ActionItem",
    "IncidentState",
    "TranscriptSegment",
    "IntakeFacts",
    "CallerRecord",
    "VisionDetection",
    "FrameAnalysis",
    "SceneDelta",
    "TriageResult",
    "Corroboration",
    "EvidenceFusionResult",
    "DispatchBrief",
    "AgentLogEntry",
]
EOF)

Bash(/Users/benlloyd/Desktop/REPO/mistralhack26/apps/server/.venv/bin/pip list 2>&1 | grep pytest; uv pip install pytest pytest-asyncio --project /Users/benlloyd/Desktop/REPO/mistralhack26/apps/server 2>&1)

Bash(.specify/scripts/bash/create-new-feature.sh --json "002-pydantic-agents" --number 2 --short-name "pydantic-agents" "Pydantic-AI agent definitions for TriageNet: triage, intake, vision, dispatch, case-match, and voice agents with structured outputs")
Bash(cd /Users/benlloyd/Desktop/REPO/mistralhack26/apps/server && uv run python -m pytest src/tests/test_phase2_supabase.py -v 2>&1)

Bash(cd /Users/benlloyd/Desktop/REPO/mistralhack26/apps/server && .venv/bin/python -c "from src.agents import triage_agent, intake_agent, dispatch_agent, evidence_fusion_agent, analyze_frame, compute_scene_delta; print\('All agents imported successfully'\)")
Bash(.venv/bin/python -m pytest src/tests/test_phase1_models.py src/tests/test_phase3_mistral.py src/tests/test_phase4_elevenlabs.py src/tests/test_phase5_agents.py -v -s 2>&1 | tail -30)
Bash(uv run python -c "from src.config import settings; print\('Key starts with:', settings.elevenlabs_api_key[:10] if settings.elevenlabs_api_key else 'EMPTY'\)")
Bash(.venv/bin/python -m pytest src/tests/test_phase1_models.py src/tests/test_phase3_mistral.py src/tests/test_phase4_elevenlabs.py src/tests/test_phase5_agents.py -v -s 2>&1 | tail -40)
Bash(uv run python -m pytest src/tests/test_phase4_elevenlabs.py -v -s -p no:logfire)

Bash(git add .gitignore .claude/settings.local.json .specify/memory/constitution.md CLAUDE.md docs/ supabase/ specs/001-backend-foundation/ apps/server/pyproject.toml apps/server/.python-version apps/server/uv.lock apps/server/.env.example apps/server/src/config.py apps/server/src/deps.py apps/server/src/__init__.py apps/server/src/models/ apps/server/src/services/ apps/server/src/agents/shared_deps.py apps/server/src/agents/__init__.py apps/server/src/routes/__init__.py apps/server/src/tests/__init__.py apps/server/src/tests/test_phase1_models.py apps/server/src/tests/test_phase2_supabase.py apps/server/src/tests/test_phase3_mistral.py apps/server/src/tests/test_phase4_elevenlabs.py 2>&1)
